description.en: The path to the gzip file on disk, as a str or bytes. Equivalent to the output of os.fspath() on the original input path, with no other normalization, resolution or expansion.

excerpt.es: The path to the gzip file on disk, as a str or bytes. Equivalent to the output of os.fspath() on the original input path, with no other normalization, resolution or expansion.
